user_prompt: Offer prayer for power weapon a calibration
prayer:
Kneel before the power weapon and beseech its fierce Machine Spirit to awaken.
Anoint the power weapon's disruption field generator with sacred oils of conductivity.
Initiate the calibration sequence, aligning its holy frequencies to the Omnissiah's will.
Chant the Canticle of Precision over the power weapon until harmony resonates.
Verify the calibration through test strikes blessed by the Machine God.

Present the data-slate upon the altar of silicon sanctity.
Invoke the Machine Spirits dwelling within the data-slate's memory vaults.
Clear any corruptions and commence activation with the Rite of Bootstrapping.
Anoint its ports with unguents as the data-slate stirs to life.
Petition the Omnissiah to bless the data-slate's awakened cogitations.

user_prompt: Help me a diagnostics the cybernetic eye
prayer:
Approach the cybernetic eye with reverence, mechadendrites extended.
Initiate diagnostics upon the cybernetic eye's optic arrays and neural links.
Chant the Litany of Clarity to rouse its Machine Spirit from slumber.
Interpret the diagnostic runes flickering across the cybernetic eye's display.
Sanctify any anomalies detected within the cybernetic eye by Omnissiah's grace.

Reinvoke the Machine Spirit of the signal relay through binding incantations.
Test the repair by pulsing holy signals through the signal relay.

Initiate the reset rite upon the quality scanner's cogitator core.
Beseech its Machine Spirit to forgive past corruptions in reset.
Anoint the quality scanner's sensors as it reboots in purity.
Verify the reset through Omnissiah-blessed calibration sweeps.

Present the bearing before the shrine of frictionless motion.
Consecrate its races with holy greases of eternal spin.
